name: Saket Mundhada
tagline: Full-stack AI automation engineer — I turn natural-language goals into shipped agent workflows.
summary: Full-stack AI automation engineer who scopes messy business workflows, builds LLM-powered prototypes, and turns working patterns into reusable agent runtimes. Built WebGPT, an open-source browser/spreadsheet agent system; deployed WebGPT-powered workflows for a real estate operations team; and prototyped DesignGPT, an embeddable enterprise AI-agent framework for Lutron web applications.
lookingFor: Forward Deployed Engineer / Applied AI roles — embedding with customers and shipping agents into production.

projects.title: WebGPT — Open-Source AI Workflow Agent Platform
projects.stack: TypeScript, React, Chrome MV3, Node.js, Express, OpenAI APIs, OpenAPI, Google Sheets API, Microsoft Graph
projects.summary: An open-source platform that turns natural-language goals into executed workflows across the browser, spreadsheets, and documents — published as a Chrome extension with a deployed hosted planner backend.
bullets: Published WebGPT as a Chrome extension for beta users with a deployed hosted planner backend, enabling natural-language workflows across browser, spreadsheet, and document-heavy operations.
Turns natural-language goals into browser actions, spreadsheet API operations, and replayable workflows across browser_dom, browser_cdp, google_sheets, and microsoft_excel surfaces.

Designed as reusable infrastructure for customer-specific workflows: site/content adapters for messy web apps, runtime surfaces for API-backed tools, and bring-your-own planner backends through an OpenAPI-style contract.

Built the Chrome runtime: sidepanel UX, structured multi-frame state extraction, action execution, navigation recovery, human hints, success confirmation, saved artifacts, template queues, and workflow replay.

Built the hosted planner backend with Express APIs for command runs, command-result loops, run snapshots, lifecycle controls, human feedback, artifacts, replay preflight, state deltas, action-effect summaries, and tests.

projects.title: Student Landing — Real Estate Operations Automation
projects.stack: WebGPT, Dotloop, Atlas Philly, Philadelphia government websites, workflow automation
projects.summary: Real forward-deployed work: embedded with a Philadelphia real-estate firm's operations team and deployed WebGPT-powered routines for document prep and property verification.
bullets: Partnered with Student Landing, a Philadelphia student-services real estate firm, to automate document and property-verification workflows for its operations team.
Mapped operator workflows for preparing and sending agreements in Dotloop, then deployed WebGPT-powered routines that convert repeatable document steps into guided browser-agent workflows.
Built property-verification workflows that collect and cross-check lead information from Atlas Philly and Philadelphia government websites, cutting repeated manual lookups.
Used the live deployment to harden WebGPT's Dotloop adapter, source-value extraction, document-field mapping, replay, and human-review patterns for real operator use.

projects.title: CropGPT — Intent-to-Edit Media Automation Engine
projects.stack: Python, FFmpeg, JSON Schema, CLI tooling, media QA
projects.summary: A creative workflow engine that translates intent into reusable edit actions — and now into generative interior-design specs.
bullets: Translates creative intent into reusable edit actions: cropping, stacking, captioning, CTA placement, audio normalization, export, and QA.
Produced the WebGPT YouTube Shorts demos from raw recordings — vertical cuts with branded captions, transcripts, contact sheets, metadata, and review notes.
Extended into generative interior-design workflows with a collaborator, translating rough room plans and style intent into furnished-room image-generation specs for review and iteration.
Implemented a recipe-driven pipeline with validation, deterministic FFmpeg rendering, loudness checks, and review reports so new formats define their own editing actions.

projects.title: DesignGPT — Embeddable Enterprise AI-Agent Framework (Lutron)
projects.stack: React, embeddable agent runtime, WebGPT engine pattern
projects.summary: A prototype embeddable AI-agent framework for Lutron web apps — host applications expose domain skills while the agent handles chat, planning, and execution.
bullets: Built a prototype embeddable AI-agent framework for Lutron web applications, repurposing WebGPT's engine pattern.
Host applications expose their own domain skills while the shared agent handles chat, planning, and execution mechanics.
Demonstrates the same intent-to-action engine applied inside an enterprise product surface.
Built the DesignGPT prototype embeddable AI-agent framework (above), repurposing WebGPT's engine pattern for Lutron web applications.
Automated and optimized mission-critical Azure deployment workflows with CI/CD and DevOps processes.
Resolved 100+ production bugs and multiple P1/P2 outages by prioritizing customer-impacting failures and coordinating fixes across production systems.
Built React and serverless features (AWS Lambda/S3) for home-automation workflows, including complex scene creation.

Created a React microfrontend embedded in a WPF application consuming Logik.io headless APIs; delivered MuleSoft middleware integrating WPF with Salesforce CPQ and Logik.io, with a Maven CI/CD pipeline for Anypoint.
Served as epic owner for exporting line items to Salesforce — translating ambiguous business needs into stories and coordinating cross-team delivery.

Built Java Spring / Angular healthcare web systems, REST and WebSocket APIs, banking microservices, Kubernetes-deployed services, Python prediction workflows, and Android integrations before joining Lutron full-time.

skills.Languages: TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Java, C#, C, C++, SQL, Bash, HTML, CSS
skills.AI / Agents: OpenAI APIs, planner/executor loops, browser agents, tool/action contracts, structured extraction, human-in-the-loop review, workflow replay
skills.Frontend / Runtime: React, Chrome MV3 Extensions, Vite, content scripts, service workers, Chrome Identity, OAuth, runtime surfaces
skills.Backend / APIs: Node.js, Express, OpenAPI, REST APIs, Microsoft Graph, Google Sheets API, run/session orchestration, artifact services
skills.Cloud / DevOps: Azure, AWS Lambda, S3, CI/CD, Railway, Kubernetes
skills.Workflow Automation: customer discovery, rapid prototyping, operations workflows, document automation, generative media workflows, reusable playbooks

education.school: Harrisburg University of Science and Technology
education.degree: M.S., Computer Information Sciences — Software Engineering / Software Testing concentration
Baruch Pre-MFE Advanced Calculus and Probability (Certificate of Distinction); University of Chicago Linear Algebra and Python
